content:
I am horribly late to the Mouchette train but I wanted to show off what she can do a little bit
https://youtu.be/4Z_65f0_9PU

embeds.title: "Strike" Through the Reinforce | Arc 2 H2-12; Mouchette E3 Showcase
embeds.description:
Mouchette is kind of busted... Granted with Helot around but I've seen other crazy clears like a 7 turn on H4-10 (where she did a million damage in ultra turn, through 70 reinforce...)

(also video is a bit slower)

Hope you enjoy the clear!~ ^^

Music used:
Feryquitous - Nobody
